title: Slime Chunk Finder
description: Easily find Slime Chunks in your Minecraft world using F3 or a simple command!
body:
Easily find Slime Chunks in your Minecraft world using F3 or a simple command!
This mod enhances your gameplay by providing quick and easy ways to determine if you're in a Slime Chunk.

Features:
Command: /isslime
Instantly tells you if you're currently in a Slime Chunk.
F3 Integration:
Displays Slime Chunk information directly in the debug screen (F3).
Works with any seed:
Seamlessly compatible with all world seeds.
Lightweight and user-friendly:
Adds convenience without any performance impact.
Compatible with Minecraft 1.20.1:

Perfect for:
Slime farms: Easily locate and plan your builds.
Gathering slimeballs: Spend more time adventuring and less time searching.
Explorers and builders: Optimize your projects with minimal effort.
Add this mod to your toolkit and make finding Slime Chunks effortless!
